name: rung_459_excursion_hn_scope_correction
utterances: Use reported/2, affected_scope/2, corrected_scope_to/2, attributed_to/2, preserved_claim/2.

utterances.utterance: Early thread comments framed docker pull failures as country-wide.
clarification_answers: Set reported(hn_thread, docker_pull_failures). Set affected_scope(docker_pull_failures, whole_country).

utterances.utterance: Follow-up correction narrowed scope to a single ISP segment, not whole-country impact.
clarification_answers: Retract affected_scope(docker_pull_failures, whole_country). Set corrected_scope_to(docker_pull_failures, single_isp_segment).

utterances.utterance: The cause link to a block-rule mitigation thread remained discussed despite scope correction.
clarification_answers: Set attributed_to(docker_pull_failures, cloudflare_block_rule). Set preserved_claim(hn_thread, cause_link_survived_scope_correction).
